titleStmt.title: SII 40.296: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 296. (A.R. No. B. 341 of 1933.) Uppalapāḍu, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone built into the bund of the tank.
This is dated Śaka 1449, Sarvajit, Āśvayuja, śu. 10, Friday, corresponding to 1527 A.D., October 4.

Records the construction of a tank at Uppalapāḍu in Bellaṁkoṇḍa-sīma by Mādinēdu, son of Mummaya and Pāpasāni. Further it records the gift of lands at Reḍḍipādu to Mādinēḍu, for the maintenance of the tank by Koṇḍayyaṅgaru, son of Pemmasāni Pegaḍinēdu, who was administering the village.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrī śālivā
hana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1449 Agu
nēṁṭi sa¨rvvajit saṁvvatsara Āśvayu
ji śu 10 śu . peṁmmasāni pegaḍinēni komā
ruṁḍu koṁḍḍayyaṁgāru bellamu ko
ṁḍḍasīmalōni vuppalapāḍu yelucuṁ
ḍḍaṁgānu peḍikiṭi mādinēni muṁmmaya
komāruṁḍu mādineṁḍu tamataṁḍri muṁ
maṇyanikinni tamatalli pāpasānikikinni puṇyamugā
nu vuppalapāṭanu dhaṁ¨rmmataṭākamu kaṭṭiṁccinaṁ
dduku koṁḍḍayyaṁgāru tamataṁḍri pegaḍine
niṁgārikiṁnni tamatalli Amalasāniṁgāri
kiṁnni puṇyamugānu yī ceruvukiṁddanu
mādinēniki reḍḍipāṭini paṁddumu vittila
maḍi sa¨rvvamānyamugānu Iccenu . yi
dduku Aṣṭalōkapāladhaṁ¨rmmasākṣi . svada
ttā duhitācaiva pitṛdatā sahudarī . pa
radattā tathā mātātribhi triṣu viva
¨rjayate .
Digital edition of SII 40.296 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
